allow: Bash(python3 scripts/search.py "padel tournament ranking competitive sports elegant professional" --design-system -p "Ranking Padel SRB")
Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python3 scripts/search.py "padel tournament ranking competitive sports elegant professional" --design-system -p "Ranking Padel SRB")

Bash(echo "Started PID=$!" sleep 4 node -e " const http = require\('http'\); function get\(path\) { return new Promise\(\(res, rej\) => { http.get\('http://localhost:3001' + path, r => { let d = ''; r.on\('data', c => d += c\); r.on\('end', \(\) => { try { res\(JSON.parse\(d\)\); } catch\(e\) { res\(d\); } }\); }\).on\('error', rej\); }\); } async function main\(\) { const cats = await get\('/api/tournaments/1/categories'\); console.log\('Categories:', Array.isArray\(cats\) ? cats.map\(c=>c.name+' \(id:'+c.id+'\)'\).join\(', '\) : JSON.stringify\(cats\).substring\(0,200\)\); const ranking = await get\('/api/tournaments/1/ranking/1'\); console.log\('Ranking cat1:', Array.isArray\(ranking\) ? ranking.length + ' players, first: ' + \(ranking[0] ? ranking[0].name + ' pts=' + ranking[0].points : 'none'\) : JSON.stringify\(ranking\).substring\(0,200\)\); const rounds = await get\('/api/tournaments/1/rounds'\); if \(Array.isArray\(rounds\)\) { const byStatus = {}; rounds.forEach\(r => { byStatus[r.status] = \(byStatus[r.status]||0\)+1; }\); console.log\('Rounds:', rounds.length, '| statuses:', JSON.stringify\(byStatus\)\); } else console.log\('Rounds err:', JSON.stringify\(rounds\).substring\(0,200\)\); } main\(\).catch\(e => console.error\('ERR:', e.message\)\); ")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'{p.get\(\\"name\\",\\"?\\"\):30s} email={p.get\(\\"email\\",\\"NONE\\"\)} wpp={p.get\(\\"whatsapp\\",\\"NONE\\"\)}'\) for p in d[:10]]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; [print\(f'{p.get\(\\"id_player\\"\):4d} | {p.get\(\\"name\\",\\"\\"\):25s} | email={p.get\(\\"email\\",\\"-\\"\):40s} | wpp={p.get\(\\"whatsapp\\",\\"-\\"\):20s}'\) for p in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if 'arcio' in \(p.get\('name'\) or ''\) or 'elia' in \(p.get\('name'\) or ''\)]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; [print\(f'id={p.get\(\\"id_player\\"\)} name={p.get\(\\"name\\"\)} email={p.get\(\\"email\\"\)} wpp={p.get\(\\"whatsapp\\"\)}'\) for p in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if p.get\('name'\) and \('arcio' in p['name'].lower\(\) or 'elia' in p['name'].lower\(\)\)]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total:', len\(d\)\); [print\(f'{m[\\"id_match\\"]}: {m[\\"scheduled_date\\"]} status={m[\\"status\\"]} my={m[\\"my_score\\"]} opp={m[\\"opp_score\\"]} won={m[\\"won\\"]}'\) for m in d[:5]]")
